item.title: Orange Amplifiers Dual Baby 100 100W 2-Ch Solid State Guitar Amp Head - Open Box $573.71 [12% price drop]
item.description:
Packâ€™m & Rackâ€™m

When just one blistering lead channel isnâ€™t enough, thereâ€™s the incredibly portable Orange Dual Baby. Itâ€™s a behemoth in a pint-sized package that offers two channels of lead-playing possibilities. Weighing only just over 3 kg and with a minimal footprint, Dual Baby can effortlessly power any monster cab.

This simple A and B channel design means duelling lead tones and/or alternating rhythm opportunities abound. Channel A mimics the rich and responsive tone of our flagship Rockerverb amps in a reliable solid-state design. From clean, to crunch, to full-on saturation, thereâ€™s no shortage of Orange mojo. Thereâ€™s also a brand-new Tubby switch, which boosts the bottom-end early in the signal chain â€” ideal for creating a â€œrounderâ€ tone when playing clean or when searching for just the right â€œdirty-cleanâ€ sound.

Channel B, with itâ€™s 4 gain stages, allows players to dial in exactly the desired level of grit, from clean to crunchy and everywhere in between, with ample saturation and a valve-like â€œedge-of-breakupâ€ tone unheard of in any other solid-state unit. The Tight switch gives the amp spring and bounce at lower gain levels for players who really want to tighten up and shred. Tweak frequencies with the 3-band sweepable EQ and presence controls to add shimmer or dial in mids that sit perfectly in the mix.

Variable output options like a balanced DI XLR out for adding IRs later within your DAW along with dual speaker outputs for utilizing multiple cabs makes the Dual Baby super flexible.

Tubby Switch

Channel Aâ€™s Tubby switch adds heft to clean and edge-of-break-up lead tones, offering an even broader range of voicing options.

Tight Switch

Get tighter with an instant â€œbright boostâ€ on Dual Babyâ€™s B Channel. It raises the top end at lower gain levels to give blistering solos even more cut.

Pack up and Play

Pack this Baby up in the included gig bag or rack it up with optional rack ears, no sweat!

 

Listed By: ProAudioStar on 2025-04-15T10:50:25-05:00

item.title: Reverend Sensei Jr. Korina Burst (Serial #66673) $684.14 [22% price drop]
item.description:
The following specs were carefully collected and recorded by a skilled technician. For a more detailed description and questions regarding sound, feel, or cosmetic condition, please call to speak to one of our experts.

Summary

Body Material: Korina/Limba

Neck Material: Korina/Limba

Fingerboard Radius: 12.00"

Nut Width: 1-21/32"

Scale Length: 25

Electronics: Original P-90 with volume, tone, and bass contour

Pickup Measurements: 12.09k ohms

Weight: 7 lbs 7 oz

Cosmetic Condition: This guitar is in good condition. The finish has chipped off on the front and back of the bass side lower bout.

Modifications/Repairs: The areas where the finish has chipped off have been sanded down and buffed to help prevent further finish chipping.

Serial Number: 66673

Tech Notes: The guitar plays well with optimal neck relief and low string action. The frets are tall with no signs of play wear.

Case Details: case/gig bag not included 

Listed By: Chicago Music Exchange on 2025-05-22T18:22:43-05:00

item.title: Mint Orange DUAL BABY Twin Channel 100-Watt Guitar Amplifier Head w/FX Loop $583.47
item.description:
Packâ€™m & Rackâ€™m

When just one blistering lead channel isnâ€™t enough, thereâ€™s the incredibly portable Orange Dual Baby. Itâ€™s a behemoth in a pint-sized package that offers two channels of lead-playing possibilities. Weighing only just over 3 kg and with a minimal footprint, Dual Baby can effortlessly power any monster cab.

This simple A and B channel design means duelling lead tones and/or alternating rhythm opportunities abound. Channel A mimics the rich and responsive tone of our flagship Rockerverb amps in a reliable solid-state design. From clean, to crunch, to full-on saturation, thereâ€™s no shortage of Orange mojo. Thereâ€™s also a brand-mint Tubby switch, which boosts the bottom-end early in the signal chain â€” ideal for creating a â€œrounderâ€ tone when playing clean or when searching for just the right â€œdirty-cleanâ€ sound.

Channel B allows players to dial in exactly the desired level of grit, from clean to crunchy and everywhere in between, with ample saturation and a valve-like â€œedge-of-breakupâ€ tone unheard of in any other solid-state unit. The Tight switch gives the amp spring and bounce at lower gain levels for players who really want to tighten up and shred. Tweak frequencies with the 3-band sweepable EQ and presence controls to add shimmer or dial in mids that sit perfectly in the mix.

Variable output options like a balanced DI XLR out for adding IRs later within your DAW along with dual speaker outputs for utilizing multiple cabs makes the Dual Baby super flexible.

Features: 100 watt guitar head
Class A/B solid state power stage
Single-ended Jfet preamp stage
Channel A for clean to dirty
Channel B for crunch to high gain
Foot switchable channels
Tubby switch on Channel A
Tight switch on Channel B
Buffered FX Loop
Carry gig bag
Rack mountable Controls: Channel A controls:
Gain, Volume, Presence, Bass, Middle and Treble.
Tubby switch

Channel B controls:
Gain, Volume, Presence, Bass, Middle and Treble.
Tight switch

Channel selector switch
Power switch

Output Power: 100 Watts RMS | 100W into 8 ohms or 70W into 16 ohms Unboxed Dimensions (W x H x D): 300 x 80 x 195 mm / 11.81 x 3.15 x 7.68â€ Unboxed Weight: 3.59 KG (7.91 lbs) Tubby Switch

Channel Aâ€™s Tubby switch adds heft to clean and edge-of-break-up lead tones, offering an even broader range of voicing options.

Tight Switch

Get tighter with an instant â€œbright boostâ€ on Dual Babyâ€™s B Channel. It raises the top end at lower gain levels to give blistering solos even more cut.

Pack up and Play

Pack this Baby up in the included gig bag or rack it up with optional rack ears, no sweat!

 

Listed By: Butler Music on 2025-06-10T12:31:58-05:00
